name: the scaffolded ctp.config.yaml is a valid §2.5 profile that passes profile validation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" init >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-profile.sh" --profile ctp.config.yaml >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo scaffold-is-valid-profile 1>&2
